tle_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7062366549323025408","book_info":{"abstract":"改编短剧《穿书后，女主们都能听见我心声》正在热播中……
【搞笑+心声+迪化+不干人事儿+脑洞大+多女主】
唐傲穿越到都市龙王爽文里成为反派富二代，唯有推进剧情才能带着奖励回到原来的世界！
未婚妻周巧儿竟是最终大反派？
唐傲兢兢业业的想要苟到大结局完成剧情，只是事情发生了亿点点偏差。
霸道女总裁林若雪，我是你最讨厌的舔狗啊，你为什么要当众亲我？
我的天呐，周灵儿你抽什么风，我才是反派，你为什么扇主角叶辰巴掌？
李诗韵！你这个浓眉大眼的，怎么也不对劲了？
唐傲父母：所谓纨绔只是我儿子的伪装，他这是想要厚积薄发，在背后偷偷努力惊艳所有人！
岳父：凭我多年的经验分析，唐傲一定就是传说中的龙王！
龙王叶辰：？？？
唐傲是我叶辰一生之敌！
唐傲：我真只是一个微不足道的小反派啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/22da90e2e640a9c23a7e8a891010ec83","author":"萌萌哒大恶魔","author_id":"","book_id":"7062366549323025408","book_name":"穿书舔狗反派，美女总裁强吻倒追","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#180808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6386人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7062371801997050407","read_count":"6386","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"639170"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"296","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,多女主,反派,穿书,搞笑轻松,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/110ccff9749de7d95ad58e51ae4ac6bd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779506073&x-signature=mKvLkk11Cc%2FJjWNe3bjnKGlxcT4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book 不考虑其他因素我只说一点，故事诙谐幽默嘻哈逗笑，就这一点值得阅读。
此书特别适合心情不好、生活压力大的朋友阅读！
